user_query: Show me everything related to Belgium across all our systems.

plan.query: Show me everything related to Belgium across all our systems.
plan.reasoning: The user is requesting a comprehensive view of all data related to Belgium, which requires insights from all available agents including graph for communications and documents, salesforce for CRM-related data, and smartsales for location and catalog information.

steps.task: Search for all emails, calendar events, and documents related to Belgium.
Fetch all accounts, contacts, leads, and opportunities related to Belgium.
Retrieve all location and catalog items associated with Belgium.

plan.synthesis: Aggregate and summarize the results from all three steps to provide a full picture of everything related to Belgium.

invoked_agents.input: Search for all emails, calendar events, and documents related to Belgium.
Fetch all accounts, contacts, leads, and opportunities related to Belgium.
Retrieve all location and catalog items associated with Belgium.
